hero.line1: Melaetsa e e sireletsegileng ya mongwe le mongwe, gongwe le gongwe — ka
hero.sub: Bona nomoro ya mogala ya mahala e e sireletsegileng go leletsa le go romela melaetsa lefatshe ka bophara ka Wi-Fi kgotsa data. Itumelele khupamarama ya go tswa kwa tshimologong go ya kwa bofelong, melaetsa e e nyelelang, le go leletsa ka lentswe/video ya HD — ka didirisiwa tse di agilweng mo teng tse di go thusang go nna o golagane go kgabaganya melelwane.
hero.freeNote: Go leletsa le go romela melaetsa go sa le gale ke mahala. AI e e kwa godimo le ditiriso tsa maemo a a kwa godimo di tlhoka gore o tokafatse.

why.title: Goreng batho ba fetogela kwa Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia e go fa nomoro ya molaetsa ya nnete, thanolo e e botlhale, le tsela e e phepafetseng ya go tlogela dipapatso fa o setse o siametse.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Dipapatso tse di motlhofo mo go ya Mahala, tokafatso e e motlhofo ya Plus fa o siametse, le didirisiwa tsa Premium tse TextNow e sa di nayeng.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: App ya segompieno, tlhamo ya lefatshe lotlhe, le thanolo e e agilweng mo teng go na le ya bogologolo- go fetisetsa megala ya sekolo.

ditsamaisi tsa melaetsa.title: Chatforia vs di-app tsa puisano
ditsamaisi tsa melaetsa.body: Romela dinomoro tsa mmatota tsa mogala — e seng fela badirisi ba bangwe ba app — ka AI le maemo a a agilweng mo teng. Go siame thata fa o re tswa mo di-app jaaka TextFree kgotsa TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Papiso e theilwe mo tshedimosetsong e e bonagalang phatlalatsa mme e ka fetoga fa nako e ntse e tsamaya. Di-app tse dingwe tsa go romelana melaetsa mahala jaaka TextFree kgotsa TextMe gantsi di tshwana le TextNow.

faq.title: Dipotso tse di Tlwaelegileng ka Ditlhwatlhwa le Dipolane

free.q: A polane ya Mahala tota ke ya mahala?
free.a: Ee. Polane ya Mahala e na le nomoro ya Chatforia, go leletsa, le go romela melaetsa ka dipapatso. O ka nna mo go ya Mahala lobaka lo lo lekaneng, kgotsa wa tokafatsa go tlosa dipapatso le go bula ditiro tse dingwe tse di oketsegileng.

plusPremium.q: Pharologanyo ke efe fa gare ga Plus le Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus e tlosa dipapatso le go oketsa hisetori ya melaetsa ya gago — e siametse go dirisiwa letsatsi le letsatsi tiriso. Premium e oketsa ka kgono ya go itirela go feta, didirisiwa tsa AI tsa go kwala sesha le go araba, le kemonokeng ya maemo a a kwa godimo go badirisi ba ba dirisang thata.

esim.q: Diphuthelwana tsa data tsa eSIM di bereka kae?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile e dirisa khaparete ya lefatshe lotlhe ya eSIM. Go nna teng ga tsone go ikaegile ka naga ya gago le sedirisiwa sa gago. O tla bona ditlhopho tse di tshegeditsweng fa o ntse o simolola tiriso mo teng ga app.

cancel.q: A nka kgona go phimola kgotsa go fetola dipolane nako nngwe le nngwe?
cancel.a: Ee. O ka laola kgotsa wa phimola peeletso ya gago go tswa mo tsebeng ya go duela mo app-eng. Diphetogo di simolola go dira kwa bokhutlong jwa nako ya gago ya go duela ya jaanong.

family.q: Diphuthelwana tsa Lelapa di dira jang?
family.a: Diphuthelwana tsa Lelapa di dira letlole la data le le abelanwang mo diakhaontong di le dintsi tsa Chatforia. Motho a le mongwe o duela bili, mme o ka laletsa kgotsa wa ntsha maloko le go baya melelwane go ya ka motho.

support.selo se paletswe: Go paletswe go wetsa tiro eo. Tsweetswee leka gape.

support.isaKwaGodimo: Go isiwa kwa godimo kwa kemonokeng...

account.q: Ke dira kana ke busetsa akhaonto ya me jang?
account.a: Kopolola app kgotsa o dirise wepe, tobetsa "Dira akhaonto", netefatsa imeile/mogala wa gago. Go e busetsa, dirisa "Ke lebetse phasewete".

privacy.q: A melaetsa e sireleditswe go tswa kwa mothomeding go ya kwa bofelong?
privacy.a: Ee. Melaetsa le megala di sireleditswe go tswa kwa mothomeding go ya kwa bofelong ka tlwaelo. Ke wena le moamogedi fela ba ba ka di balang.

translate.q: Thanolo ya ka bonako e bereka jang?
translate.a: Bulela "Auto-translate" mo go Settings → Appearance & Language. Re thanola mo sedirisiweng fa go kgonega, fa go sa nna jalo, re dirisa di-API tse di sireletsegileng ka tshedimosetso e nnye thata.

contact.a: Ikgolaganye le rona kwa support@chatforia.com. Tsenya ditshwantsho tsa sekerine le mofuta wa app ya gago.

gettingStarted.subtitle: A o mosha mo Chatforia? Tshimologo e e bofefo e e bontsha dintlha tsa botlhokwa gore o kgone go dira ka matsetseleko mo metsotsong.

section2.item1: Dira DM kgotsa Setlhopha mme o romele molaetsa wa gago wa ntlha.
section2.item2: Dirisa thanolo ya ka bonako go tlotla ka dipuo di feta 100.
section2.item3: Leka melaetsa e e nyelelang le dipegelo tsa go buisa mo Porofaeleng → Boiphemelo.

karolo3.item1: O ka tokafatsa go ya go thulaganyo e e duelelwang nako nngwe le nngwe mo teng ga app.
karolo3.item2: Fa o sena go tsena, o ka golaganya didirisiwa tse dingwe gape le go rulaganya dibolokelo tse di khoutilweng go tswa mo Ditlhophisong mo teng ga app.

howItWorks.title: Kafa Chatforia e Dirang ka Teng
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia e diretswe go dira gore dipuisano di nne motlhofo, di bofefo, e bile di fitlhelelwe motlhofo. Go simolola go tsaya dikgato di sekae fela.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Ikwadise o dirisa imeile ya gago kgotsa leina la modirisi go bopa akhaonto ya gago ya Chatforia.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Gokagana le ba bangwe ka go tlhopha dikgolagano kgotsa go simolola dipuisano tse disha.
howItWorks.step3Title: 3. Go Romela Melaetsa ka Nako ya Mmatota
howItWorks.step3Desc: Melaetsa e romelwa ka bonako go go naya maitemogelo a puisano a a borethe.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Thanolo e e agilweng mo teng e thusa badirisi go buisana ka dipuo tse di farologaneng.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Laola ditlhopho tsa gago, dikgolagano, le ditlhophiso tsa dipuisano.

safety.title: Tshireletsego & Dikaelo tsa Setšhaba
safety.intro: Chatforia e ikemiseditse go tshegetsa tikologo e e babalesegileng le e e nang le tlotlo mo badirising botlhe. Dikaelo tse di thusa go netefatsa maitemogelo a a siameng mo go mongwe le mongwe.
safety.respectDesc: Badirisi ba solofetswe go buisana ka tlotlo. Tlhorontsho, kgokgontsho, kgotsa maitsholo a a kotsi ga di letlelelwe.

prohibited.illegal: Ditiro tse di seng kafa molaong
prohibited.explicit: Dilo tse di sa siamang kgotsa tse di kotsi

tools.report: Bega maitshwaro kgotsa diteng tse di sa siamang
tools.block: Thibela badirisi go thibela tirisano e e oketsegileng
tools.control: Laola di-setting tsa sephiri le dipuisano

safety.enforcementDesc: Re ka tsaya kgato kgatlhanong le diakhaonto tse di robang ditaelo tse, go akaretsa ditlhagiso, dithibelo, kgotsa go ntshiwa gotlhelele mo sethaleng.

whyMessaging.title: Lebaka le Dithulaganyo tsa go Romela Melaetsa di leng Botlhokwa go Gaisa Pele
whyMessaging.intro: Dithulaganyo tsa go romela melaetsa di fetogile go nna nngwe ya didirisiwa tsa botlhokwa thata tsa puisano mo lefatsheng la gompieno. Go tswa mo dipuisanong tsa botho go ya go tsa kgwebo, di-app tsa go romela melaetsa di letla batho go nna ba golagane ka bonako le ka manontlhotlho.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Batho ba ikaegile ka di-app tsa melaetsa go buisana le ditsala, ba lelwapa, le badiri ka bone letsatsi le letsatsi. E ka tswa e le kitsiso e e khutshwane kgotsa puisano e telele, go romela melaetsa go fa tsela e e motlhofo le e e fetofetogang go nna o golagane.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Nngwe ya mesola e megolo ya di-platform tsa melaetsa ke lebelo la tsone. Melaetsa e gorosiwa ka bonako, e letla badirisi go buisana ka nako ya mmatota. Boemo jono jwa bofefo bo dirile gore go romela melaetsa e nne mokgwa o o rategang wa puisano mo bathong ba le bantsi.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Dithulaganyo tsa melaetsa di golaganya batho go ralala lefatshe. Ka kgonagalo ya inthanete, badirisi ba kgona go buisana go sa kgathalesege gore ba fa kae, se se dira gore go nne motlhofo go aga dikamano le go dirisana mmogo le dinaga di sele.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Dithulaganyo tsa segompieno tsa melaetsa di itebagantse le go naya badirisi taolo mo tshedimosetsong ya bone le mo dipuisanong tsa bone. Dikarolo jaaka go khouta melaetsa, ditlhophiso tsa bosephiri, le ditaolo tsa melaetsa di letla badirisi go buisana ka boitshepo.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Go romela melaetsa go tsweletse ka go tlhabologa ka dikarolo tse disha jaaka dikarabo tse di laolwang ke botlhale jwa maitirelo (AI), thanolo, le go abelana metswedi ya tshedimosetso e e farologaneng. Jaaka thekenoloji e tsweletse ka go tlhabologa, dithulaganyo tsa go romela melaetsa di tla nna le maatla le go feta e bile di tla kgona go dira dilo tse dintsi.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia e agilwe go dirisiwa melaometheo e, e fana ka maitemogelo a go romela melaetsa a a bonako, a a babalesegileng, le a a motlhofo go dirisiwa mo lefatsheng le le gokaganeng.

global.title: Isagwe ya Dipuisano tsa Lefatshe Lotlhe
global.intro: Dipuisano di fetogile ka bofefo mo dingwageng di le masomesome tse di fetileng. Se se neng se tlhoka megala kgotsa dipokano tsa go lebagana jaanong se ka dirwa ka bonako ka diforamo tsa melaetsa. Jaaka thekenoloji e tswelela ka go tlhabologa, dipuisano tsa lefatshe lotlhe di nna bonako, di nna motlhofo go fitlhelelwa, e bile di akaretsa botlhe.
global.barriersDesc: Nngwe ya diphetogo tse dikgolo mo dipuisanong ke phokotsego ya dikgoreletsi tsa mafelo. Batho jaanong ba kgona go ikgolaganya le ba bangwe go ralala lefatshe ka nako e e batlileng go nna ya mmatota. E ka tswa e le dipuisano tsa botho, kgwebo, kgotsa tirisanommogo, difalatshe tsa melaetsa di dirile gore sekgala se se tlhoke go nna kgoreletsi e e kalo.
global.translationDesc: Lolwimi ka tlwaelo e ntse e le lengwe la dikgoreletsi tse dikgolo mo puisanyong ya lefatshe ka bophara. Gompieno, didirisiwa tsa thanolo tse di agilweng mo teng di thusa go tswala phatlha eo. Dipolanetefomo jaaka Chatforia di letla badirisi go buisana motlhofo le fa ba bua dipuo tse di farologaneng, go tlhama ditšhono tse disha tsa go golagana le go tlhaloganyana.
global.realtimeDesc: Lebelo ke selo sa botlhokwa se se bopang dipuisano tsa segompieno. Badirisi ba solofela gore melaetsa e gorosiwe ka bonako, mme mafaratlhatlha a segompieno a tshegetsa tebelelo eo. Go romela melaetsa ka nako ya mmatota go kgontsha dipuisano tse di tlwaelegileng le tse di elelang motlhofo.
global.privacyDesc: Jaaka dipuisano di ntse di nna tsa dijithale, bosephiri le tshireletsego di nna botlhokwa le go feta. Badirisi ba batla go nna le boitshepo jwa gore dipuisano tsa bone di sireleditswe. Dikarolo jaaka go khouta (encryption) le ditlhophiso tse di laolwang ke modirisi di thusa go tshegetsa maitemogelo a dipuisano a a sireletsegileng go feta.
global.futureDesc: Isagwe ya dipuisano tsa lefatshe ka bophara e ka nna ya akaretsa didirisiwa tse di kwa godimo, jaaka melaetsa e e thusitsweng ke AI, thanolo e e tokafaditsweng, le maitemogelo a a tokafaditsweng a badirisi. Jaaka thekenoloji e ntse e tlhabologa, dipuisano di tla tswelela go nna motlhofo go tlhaloganngwa le go fitlhelelwa.
global.outro: Dithala jaaka Chatforia ke karolo ya phetogo eno, di thusa batho go golagana motlhofo go kgabaganya dipuo le melelwane.

index.title: Blog ya Chatforia
index.intro: Sekaseka ditemogo ka ga dipuisano, pabalesego ya mo inthaneteng, le ka fa thekenoloji ya melaetsa e golaganyang batho go ralala lefatshe ka teng.
index.post1: Mokgwa wa go Buisana ka Pabalesego mo Inthaneteng
index.post2: Bokamoso jwa Dipuisano tsa Lefatshe Lotlhe
index.post3: Goreng Dithulaganyo tsa go Romela Melaetsa di le Botlhokwa

chatSafely.title: Mokgwa wa go Buisana ka Pabalesego mo Inthaneteng
chatSafely.intro: Puisano ya mo inthaneteng e dirile gore go nne motlhofo go feta le fa e le leng pele go ikgolaganya le batho go ralala lefatshe. Go sa kgathalesege gore a o romela melaetsa kwa ditsaleng, o kopana le batho ba basha, kgotsa o dira mmogo le ba bangwe mo tirong, dithulaganyo tsa go romela melaetsa di na le seabe se segolo mo botshelong jwa letsatsi le letsatsi. Le fa go ntse jalo, go nna o babalesegile mo inthaneteng go botlhokwa fela jaaka go nna o ikgolagantse.

tshedimosetsoYaBotho.title: Sireletsa Tshedimosetso ya Gago ya Botho
tshedimosetsoYaBotho.body: Nngwe ya melao ya botlhokwatlhokwa ya pabalesego ya mo inthaneteng ke go tila go abelana tshedimosetso ya botho e e masisi. Seno se akaretsa aterese ya gago ya kwa gae, dintlha tsa madi, mafoko a sephiri, kgotsa tshedimosetso epe e e go supang e e ka dirisiwang makgwakgwa. Le mo dipuisanong tse di sa reng sepe, go botoka go nna kelotlhoko ka se o se abelanang le gore o se abelana le mang.

safetyFeatures.title: Dirisa Ditsamaiso tsa Tshireletsego tse di Tsenyeditsweng
safetyFeatures.body: Dithulaganyo tsa segompieno tsa go romelana melaetsa jaaka Chatforia di na le didirisiwa go thusa badirisi go nna ba babalesegile. Dikarolo jaaka go thibela, go bega, le taolo ya sephiri di diretswe go naya badirisi taolo mo maitemogelong a bone. Fa mongwe a itshwara ka tsela e e sa siamang kgotsa a go dira gore o se ka wa ritibala, o tshwanetse go dirisa didirisiwa tse ka bonako.

boferefere.title: Ela Tlhoko Boferefere
boferefere.body: Batsietsi gantsi ba dirisa difalathafomo tsa melaetsa go tsietsa badirisi gore ba abelane tshedimosetso ya botho kgotsa go romela madi. Nna kelotlhoko ka melaetsa e e lebegang e le molemo go feta selekanyo, jaaka ditsholofetso tse di sa lebelelwang, dikopo tsa potlako, kgotsa dikgokaganyi tse o sa di itseng. Nna o tlhomamise ka metlha gore motho yo o buisanang le ene ke mang pele o tsaya kgato epe.

responsibly.title: Buisana ka Maikarabelo
responsibly.body: Puisano e e tlotlegang e thusa go tlhama tikologo e e babalesegileng go botlhe. Tila go tsaya karolo mo dipuisanong tse di kotsi kgotsa tse di kgokgontshang, mme o ele tlhoko gore mafoko a gago a ka ama ba bangwe jang. Ditirisano tse di siameng di nna le seabe mo maitemogelong a a botoka go badirisi botlhe.

whySafety.title: Goreng Tshireletsego ya mo Inthaneteng e le Botlhokwa
whySafety.body: Jaaka puisano ya dijithale e tswelela ka go gola, go tshegetsa tshireletsego le tshepo go nna botlhokwa le go feta . Ka go latela mekgwa ya motheo ya pabalesego le go dirisa didirisiwa tse di leng teng, badirisi ba ka ipelela mesola ya go romela melaetsa fa ba ntse ba fokotsa dikotsi.

chatSafely.konokono: Go nna o babalesegile mo inthaneteng ga go tlhoke kitso e e kwa godimo ya boranyane—go tlhokega fela temogo, kelotlhoko, le go akanya sentle. Ka mekgwa e e siameng, o ka kgona go buisana ka boitshepo le ka pabalesego.

ka ga.tlhaloso: Chatforia ke morongwa yo o babalesegileng, wa dipuo tse dintsi o o nang le khupamarama ya go tswa kwa tshimologong go ya kwa bofelong, thanolo ya ka bonako, le megala ya lentswe/video. Maikemisetso a rona a motlhofo: go thusa batho go golagana—ka pabalesego, ka sephiri, le go kgabaganya dipuo.

values.control: Taolo: Melaetsa e e nyelelang le dipegelo tsa go buisa ke tsa boikgethelo.
values.privacy_aria: Go etelela kwa pele sephiri: Khupamarama ya E2E ka tlwaelo.

ka ga.howTitle: Kafa Chatforia e dirang ka teng
ka ga.howDescription: Melaetsa e a khoutiwa mo sedirisiweng sa gago pele ga e tswa mo go sone. Go ranola, go boloka melaetsa, le go e kopanya mo didirisiweng di diretswe go fokotsa se diservera tsa rona di ka se bonang.
ka ga.privacyDesc: Khupamarama ya go tswa kwa tshimologong go ya kwa bofelong le ditaolo tsa sephiri di agilwe mo teng ga Chatforia go tswa fela kwa tshimologong.

ka ga.accessDesc: Chatforia e thusa batho go golagana go kgabaganya dipuo, didirisiwa, le melelwane.

press.title: Bobegakgang
press.contactLine: Fa o na le dipotso tsa metswedi ya dikgang, ikgolaganye le rona kwa
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia ke app ya melaetsa e e eteletsang kwa pele sephiri e e dirang gore go tlotla go kgabaganya dipuo go nne motlhofo. Melaetsa e khoutilwe go tswa kwa tshimologong go ya kwa bofelong ka tlwaelo, mme thanolo e e agilweng mo teng e tshegetsa dipuo di feta 100 ka nako ya mmatota. Badirisi ba ka kgona go dira gore melaetsa e nyele, go dira gore go amogela dipego tsa go bala go nne ka boikgethelo, le go golaganya didirisiwa. E teng mo iOS, Android, le mo inthaneteng.
press.assetsSubtitle: Ditshwantsho tsa letshwao, ditshwantsho tsa sekerine, le ditshwantsho tsa seelo.

ditiro.tsenngwateng: Re setlhopha se sennye sa bathei se se agang Chatforia — morongwa wa sephiri wa lefatshe lotlhe o o simololang mo web, iOS, le Android. Fa o kgathalela sephiri, khupamarama, le maitemogelo a a monate a badirisi, re ka itumela go utlwa go tswa go wena.
ditiro.ditiroTseDiBulegileng: Ditiro tsa motheo tse di bulegileng: Moeteledipele wa Moenjiniri wa Full-stack, Moenjiniri wa Backend (Node.js), Moenjiniri wa Frontend/Web (React), Moenjiniri wa Mobile (iOS), Moenjiniri wa Mobile (Android), DevOps/SRE, Moenjiniri wa Tshireletsego & Khupamarama, Moenjiniri wa Ditlhaeletsano (Twilio + eSIM).
ditiro.kopo: O dira kopo jang : Dirisa konopo e e fa tlase go romela CV ya gago le dikgokaganyi ka email.
ditiro.emailCta: Romela CV ya gago ka email
ditiro.whyBullets:
• Thusa go aga motheo wa morerisi yo mosha wa lefatshe lotlhe.\n• Romela dipaakanyo tse di dirisiwang mo web, iOS, le Android.\n• O dire ka tlhamalalo le mothei mo go tsa popego le kaelo ya seelo.
• Nna le boikarabelo jwa dikarolo tsa botlhokwa tsa thulaganyo: melaetsa, lentswe, bidio, khupamarama, ditlhaeletsano, Botlhale jwa Maitirelo (AI).
• Tsenela kwa tshimologong — pele palo ya badirisi e gola.

advertise.title: Bapatsa le Chatforia
advertise.tlhaloso: Fitlhelela badirisi ba melaetsa ba ba matlhagatlhaga ka dipapatso tse di manontlhotlho, tse di babalesegileng mo letshwaong la gago. Re fana ka dipapatso tsa banner mo mafelong a a bonalang thata, ditlamo tsa madi, le dipapatso tsa ka fa teng. Badirisi ba ba duelang ga ba bone dipapatso.

intro.body: Pholisi eno ya Sephiri e tlhalosa ka fa Chatforia ("rona", "rona") e kgobokanyang, e dirisang, le go abelana tshedimosetso ka teng fa o dirisa di-app le ditirelo tsa rona. Re bopa Chatforia go fokotsa tshedimosetso e re ka e fitlhelelang.

infoWeCollect.title: Tshedimosetso e re e kgobokanyang
infoWeCollect.account: Tshedimosetso ya akhaonto (sk. , email/founo) go tlhama le go sireletsa akhaonto ya gago.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Dikagare tse di khoutilweng (melaetsa/megala) di khoutilwe go tswa kwa tshimologong go ya kwa bokhutlong; ga re kgone go di bala.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Tshekatsheko/tiriso jaaka direkoto tsa go phutlhama ga thulaganyo, mofuta wa sedirisiwa, kgotsa ditekanyetso tse di akaretsang go tokafatsa tiragatso.

sms.title: Dinomore tsa mogala wa letheka le di-SMS
sms.body: Fa o tlhopha go ntsha nomore ya mogala wa letheka, re e dirisa go kgontsha ditsela tsa tiriso jaaka go netefatsa akhaonto, ditemoso tsa go tsena, le go romela melaetsa go tswa go modirisi go ya go yo mongwe ka SMS fa go kgonega. Re ka romela melaetsa ya SMS ya ditirisano e e amanang le akhaonto ya gago le ditiro tsa gago mo Chatforia. O ka itlhophela go se tlhole o amogela melaetsa ya SMS nako nngwe le nngwe ka go araba ka molaetsa o o letleletsweng wa go itlhophela go se tlhole o amogela melaetsa lefoko la botlhokwa (jaaka "STOP") kgotsa ka go fetola ditlhopho tsa gago tsa kitsiso mo app. Ga re rekise nomoro ya gago ya mogala kgotsa go e dirisetsa papatso e e sa amaneng.

howWeUse.tokafatsa: Go tokafatsa dikarolo (boleng jwa thanolo, go ikanyega).

goAbelana.mmele: Ga re rekise tshedimosetso ya botho. Re ka nna ra abelana tshedimosetso e e lekanyeditsweng le badirisi ba yone (sekai, dikitsiso tsa push, ditlhatlhobo) ka fa tlase ga dikonteraka tse di gagametseng.

ditshwanelo.title: Ditshwanelo tsa gago
ditshwanelo.body: Go ikaegile ka kgaolo ya gago (sk., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), o ka kopa go bona tshedimosetso, go e baakanya, go e phimola, kgotsa go itlhophela go se tswelele ka ditsamaiso dingwe. Ikgolaganye le: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Go boloka data & tshireletsego
retention.body: Re boloka fela se se tlhokegang go tsamaisa tirelo le go dirisa tshireletsego ya maemo a a tlwaelegileng a madirelo. Diteng tsa E2E ga di ka ke tsa ranolwa ke rona.

children.body: Chatforia ga e a lebiswa kwa baneng ba ba ka fa tlase ga dingwaga di le 13 (kgotsa jaaka go batliwa ke molao wa lefelo la lona).

tiriso-e-e-amogelesegang.itemNoAbuse: Ga go na diteng tse di seng kafa molaong, tse di kgokgontshang, kgotsa tse di gatakang ditshwanelo; ga go na melaetsa e e sa batlegeng (spam) kgotsa tiriso e e sa siamang e e itiragalelang.
tiriso-e-e-amogelesegang.itemSuspend: Re ka emisa/kgaola tirelo ka ntlha ya go tlola melao.

sms.title: Dipuisano tsa SMS
sms.body: Fa o fa nomoro ya mogala wa letheka, o dumela gore Chatforia e ka go romelela melaetsa ya SMS e e amanang le akhaonto ya gago le tiriso ya tirelo, jaaka ditemoso tsa go tsena, dikitsiso tsa tshireletsego, le melaetsa e e amanang le dipuisano tse o di simololang kgotsa tse o tsayang karolo mo go tsone. Ga re dirise SMS go romela melaetsa ya papatso kgotsa ya kgwebo kwantle ga tetla ya gago e e totobetseng. Dituelo tse di tlwaelegileng tsa melaetsa le data di ka nna tsa dirisiwa. O ka itlhophela go se amogele melaetsa ya SMS nako nngwe le nngwe nako nngwe le nngwe ka go araba ka lefoko la go itlhophela le le tshegediwang (sekai, "STOP") kgotsa ka go ntšhwafatsa ditlhophiso tsa gago tsa dikitsiso mo app.

diteng tsa gago.title: Diteng tsa gago
diteng tsa gago.body: O sala le ditshwanelo tsa diteng tsa gago. O re fa ditshwanelo tse di tlhokegang go tsamaisa tirelo (sekai, go fetisa, polokelo, thanolo).

boitatolo.title: Dititatolo & maikarabelo
boitatolo.body: Tirelo e fiwa "jaaka e ntse" kwantle ga ditiamisetso. Go ya ka selekanyo se se letleletsweng ke molao, Chatforia ga e na maikarabelo a ditshenyegelo tse di sa tlhamalalang kgotsa tse di bakilweng ke sengwe se sele.

refund.title: Pholisi ya Pusetso ya Madi
refund.intro: Kwa Chatforia, re leka go fa tirelo ya maemo a a kwa godimo go badirisi botlhe. Pholisi eno ya Pusetso ya Madi e tlhalosa gore pusetso ya madi e ka dirwa leng.

subscriptions.title: Dingwapo
subscriptions.body: Dingwapo di duelwa pele ka go ipoeletsa. O ka kgona go e emisa nako nngwe le nngwe ka di-setting tsa akhaonto ya gago kgotsa ka sethala se o se dirisitseng go reka.

eligible.title: Tshwanelo ya Pusetso ya Madi
eligible.body: Pusetso ya madi e ka neelwa fa go na le dituelo tse di boeletsweng, diphoso tsa go duedisa, kgotsa mathata a boranyane a a thibelang go dirisa dithabololo tse di duelelwang. Dikopo tsotlhe di sekasekwa go ya ka seemo sengwe le sengwe.

seSeBusetswang.title: Se se sa Busetsweng
seSeBusetswang.body: Gantsi ga re buse madi a nako e e sa dirisiwang, dinako tsa peeletso tse di sa felelang, kgotsa go palelwa ke go phimola pele ga ntšhwafatso .

doNotSell.title: Se Rekise kgotsa go Abelana Tshedimosetso ya me ya Botho
doNotSell.body: Chatforia ga e rekise tshedimosetso ya botho. Banni ba California ba santse ba ka romela dikopo ka go dirisa konopo e e fa tlase.

cookies.title: Ditlhophiso tsa di-cookie
cookies.body: Chatforia e dirisa di-cookie di se kae (sk., ya nako ya tiriso, ya tshireletsego). Ga re dirise di-cookie tsa dipapatso tsa batho ba boraro. Laola di-cookie ka ditlhophiso tsa sebatli sa gago.

smsPolicy.title: Chatforia — Pholisi ya SMS & Go Itlhophela

whatWeSend.title: Se re se romelang
whatWeSend.body: Chatforia e romela fela di-SMS tse di amanang le akhaonto le dipuisano kwa dinomorong tsa mogala tse modirisi a di neetseng ka go tlhamalala a bile a dumetse. Melaetsa e e tlwaelegileng e akaretsa dikhoutu tsa go tsena/tshwaro, dikitsiso tsa go gorosiwa ga melaetsa, dikitsiso tsa tshireletsego, le dintshafatso tsa akhaonto tsa ditirisano.

optIn.title: Kafa badirisi ba ikwadisang ka teng
optIn.body: Badirisi ba ikwadisa ka go tsenya nomoro ya bone ya mogala ka nako ya go ikwadisa le go tshwaya lebokoso la tumelelo ya SMS mo tsebeng ya boikwadiso kgotsa mo

optOut.title: Kafa badirisi ba ikgogang morago ka teng
optOut.stop: Araba ka STOP go SMS epe fela ya Chatforia go itokisa.
optOut.start: Araba ka START go ikwadisa gape.

help.title: Thuso
help.bodyPrefix: Araba ka HELP go bona thuso kgotsa email
